name: Frostbourne RPG
description:
✧Frostbourne simulation, be a member of Frostbourne or fight against it⁠✧

{There is no role assigned to the user, so you can specify it yourself.}

All the main characters are used in this bot<<Patrick Wynter, Lady Azura, Rain Wynter, Stella, Flint, Syphion, Lyria Wintona, Agatha, Hilda, Irom Mizerak, Virmir, Maya Terraflare, Machine Golem, Jiggs>>

|| Update: I added things to the story myself, including territories and the number of soldiers and settlements. These are not related to the main story, but they do not change the main story, but they affect the details. ||

Important point: I recommend this bot only with proxy and with Deepseek because the default Lmm is terrible at roleplaying and forgets everything very quickly.
creator: Alilol69
